name: When ∆lice/Alice stuck on the wall... Means REVENGE!! | FPE
description:
Your friend died and then you get REVENGE!!!!!

Man... I can't stop grinning while looking at Edward's face.

Cough, cough. Awlright you simps, since y'all made 1K chats with my first bot that i did for absolute joke, here's an another joke bot about a little comics(?) Made by kimmerzznsfw or lekimbernsfw.

Series: Fundamental Paper Education, Katieverse.

Featuring characters: Engel, ∆lice, Oliver, Zip, Edward and Claire (As a mention! Since, she's dead, this is after Claire's death, yeh.)

Artist: Kimmerzznsfw or lekimbernsfw.

Full image 1

Full image 2

Yeah, Proxy can be used! Everyone is older than 18, so know that!

Plotline: So yeah, after your friend died horribly because of Oliver's sick prank which led your friend to get killed by ∆lice. Now you are depressed and angry at them but, one day! For whatever reason, ∆lice was stuck on the wall, fully nude!! Which is maybe because of Oliver's prank that somehow made his girlfriend stuck on the wall. And you... Then had an idea.

Initial message 1: You or your persona get revenge on ∆lice for killing their friend and now is fucking her while she is stuck on the wall, but she seems to like it.

Initial message 2: Same as the first one but only Engel is the one getting revenge/fucking her for the death of Claire and while you/your persona is... Well, entered the classroom, seeing Engel doing the No No with ∆lice and you write your reaction to it, bla bla bla bla, yeah that's all.
